llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes announced. Board President asked 'Do we have any changes to the agenda?' and response was 'None.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do we have a motion to approve? So moved. Seconded. All those in favor? Aye. Thank you.

items.intro_words: Okay, welcome, everybody. We'll go ahead and get started.
Can we have a roll call, please? Trustee Marquez?
So 4.2 report out on closed session from November 20, 2024.
Do we have any changes to the agenda? None.
Do we have a motion to approve the agenda? So moved.
Okay, so we have no oral communication. That brings us to 9.1.
We'll open the public hearing regarding the design build agreement for the district wide letting retrofit project.
That brings us to our bond consent items. Do we have a motion to approve?
And that brings us to 11.1. Adoption of resolution number nine and approval of energy service agreement between RCSD and Southland Industries.
That's going to bring us to 12.1 update on workforce housing project. Thank you, Peter, for being with us tonight.
All right, moving on to 12.2. Welcome Northstar. Thanks for being here.
Good evening everyone. We have quite a few board policies. Thank you so much to Janet and Elisa for your contributions on the board policy committee.
13.2. First reading and discussion of board policy 4157 Employee Safety.
Okay, we can probably take 13.3 and 13.4 together. Discussion policy. Board policy 414161 and 4261.
Okay, we can probably take 13.3 and 13.4 together. Discussion policy. Board policy 414161 and 4261.

So 135 and 136 or policy 4113.4 and 4213.4. Same situation regarding the modified light duty assignment when there is an employee injured at work and we want to get that person back to work right away within the scope of their job description, being able to be flexible based on their limitations.

So 135 and 136 or policy 4113.4 and 4213.4. Same situation regarding the modified light duty assignment when there is an employee injured at work and we want to get that person back to work right away within the scope of their job description, being able to be flexible based on their limitations.
13.7. First reading discussion of board policy 4040 Employee use of technology.
And 13.8 frustrating discussion of board policy 4113 and this one once again is just an update regarding teachers.
All right, moving on to consent items. Do we have a motion to approve?
15.1. Adoption of annual organizational meeting date set for December 17th at 7:00pm.
15.2. Adoption of resolution number 10, authorizing continued funding application for district California state preschool programs.
Reports from board members. Is there somebody who'd like to start us off?
Correspondence I received some emails and phone calls about the lighting item that we had and workforce housing.
Other business suggested items for the future. I won't be on the board, but I was thinking when we read the preschool this time I don't think we've had a preschool report in quite a while.
No changes to the calendar. Brings us to 9:17.
If we have a motion to adjourn, move. We adjourn.
